title: 『今宵の月は満月か、三日月か』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Maruzensky trains, she knows she'll never be
able to return to her heyday. Despite this, she is
making steady progress in her preparations for
the Japan Cup she promised to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the same time, Sakura Chiyono O has been
losing her appetite and her body feels heavy. In
other words...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's possible her peak is behind her, and the end
of her career might be looming in the distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's hard to say what's really happening, and
Sakura Chiyono O tries to convince herself that it
might all just be due to exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she can't shake off her anxiety. When
she asks me if I think she can still make it as
Maruzensky's rival, her question sounds more like
a desperate plea.
